summary: Navigation menu functionality testing including access to Cookbooks, Media, What We Do pages, and recipe detail page from the homepage

content.objective: Verify that clicking the COOKBOOKS navigation menu item successfully navigates to the cookbooks page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
validations: The page navigates to the cookbooks page
The page displays the heading "MY COOKBOOKS"
A grid of cookbook cover images is displayed on the page

content.objective: Verify that clicking the MEDIA navigation menu item successfully navigates to the videos page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
validations: The page navigates to the videos page
Video content thumbnails with play buttons are displayed on the page
The MEDIA tab in the navigation menu is highlighted or active

content.objective: Verify that clicking the WHAT WE DO navigation menu item successfully navigates to the culinary solutions page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
Click "WHAT WE DO" in the navigation menu
validations: The page navigates to the culinary solutions page
The page displays the heading "CULINARY SOLUTIONS"
Multiple service category cards are displayed on the page

content.objective: Verify that clicking a recipe card in the FAVOURITE HOLIDAY RECIPES section successfully navigates to the recipe detail page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
Click the recipe card named "Gefilte Fish" in the "FAVOURITE HOLIDAY RECIPES" section
validations: The page navigates to the recipe detail page
The page displays the recipe title "GEFILTE FISH 1"
Recipe ingredients and instructions are displayed on the page
